---
title: "A. M. Goodrich"
---

## A. M. Goodrich

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i>

### Biography

She wrote about  Canterbury Cathedral in the \'Cathedral Sketches\' series in <i>MP</i> (1859). She was the author of nineteen stories and tracts published by the SPCK as ‘by the author of <i>Hester</i> Blake’ (a story published in 1855) and others as ‘by the author of <i>The Chamois</i> Hunter’ (a work of which there seems to be no COPAC record).

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 26th 1876
- Letter from March 6th 1861
- Letter from Nov 3d 1860
- Letter from St John’s day [27 December] 1859                    
- Letter from Febry 16th [1855]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
